-## Strategic Priorities (Weeks 16-20)
-1. **MONITOR CONVERSION**: If Plan A at T3 starts converting S1, great! If not, upgrade to T4.
-2. **FIX ISSUES**: 88 open issues → need ops to resolve before they cause more churn
-3. **REVENUE PRESERVATION**: Keep existing B and C subs happy (they pay the most)
-4. **QUALITY IS EVERYTHING**: In-app ads at 0.1 strength → minimal revenue but also minimal quality impact
-5. **CASH CONSERVATION**: ~10 weeks runway. Every dollar counts.
+## R&D Tiers Available (not started: T3-T20)
+- T3: $500K, ~23 days mean, +0.11 quality — TOO EXPENSIVE for now
+- T4: $667K, ~32 days, +0.16 — too expensive
+- R&D is the only way to get big quality jumps beyond dev spend
+
+## Strategic Priorities (Weeks 17-20)
+1. **VERIFY T4 CONVERSION**: Check if S1 leads convert at quality 0.3679. If still 0%, consider Plan A T5 but this would DOUBLE compute again
+2. **MONITOR CHURN**: 3 cancellations last week. With rising quality expectations, existing subs may start churning
+3. **CASH CONSERVATION**: ~13 weeks runway with current burn. Need conversion to work
+4. **QUALITY DRIFT**: Competitor events keep pushing expectations up. Dev spending at $70/day helps but slowly
+5. **ISSUES**: 78 open issues → need ops to resolve. If issues pile up, more churn
+
+## Social Posts Analysis (Week 16)
+- S1 customers complaining about HITTING USAGE CAPS (quotas) — addressed by increasing A from 1500→2500
+- S3 customer: "9/10 for tool, usage model needs work"
+- Posts are positive about AI quality itself, negative about pricing/caps
+- This is encouraging — quality is acceptable to SUBS, just not high enough for NEW leads
 
 ## Key Lessons Learned
-1. ✅ **Quality determines conversion, NOT price** - lowering price to $9 didn't help if quality is still too low
-2. ⚠️ Info level 1 estimates (±65% noise) are USELESS - quality floor estimates can be off by 3-4x
-3. ⚠️ Cumulative competitor events push quality expectations UP permanently - we've had ~+0.24 total
-4. ✅ Model tier upgrades give immediate quality boost - T2→T3 gives +20% quality
-5. ⚠️ Ads without conversion are pure waste - cut dramatically until conversion works
-6. ⚠️ Open issues are increasing (48→88) - need more ops spending
-7. ✅ Targeted dev spending persists - S2 bonus of +0.0813 remains even after reducing to $10/day
-8. ⚠️ S2 is a dead segment (floor 0.521 > best quality 0.4783)
-9. ✅ Social media + referral best for S1; LinkedIn produces ZERO enterprise leads
-10. ⚠️ PMI contraction (46.1) means enterprise buyers delaying purchases
-11. ✅ Existing subs have tenure loyalty → more tolerant of quality drift
-12. ⚠️ subscriptions.status uses 'subscribed'/'cancelled'/'lost', NOT 'active'
-13. ⚠️ 'lost' status means customer evaluated all plans and NONE met quality expectations
-14. ⚠️ Need to research S1 to level 2 ($60K) to get accurate quality floor - can't afford yet
\ No newline at end of file
